raw_response:
```json
{
  "communicative_function": "The statement is a reflective exhortation urging an individual to cease self-neglect and recognize the finite nature of life.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Self-respect and self-care are important but often neglected.",
    "There is limited time available to change one's behavior.",
    "Current behaviors are characterized by self-abuse and self-contempt.",
    "There will come a point when it will be too late to change one's behavior."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement is internally coherent, creating a clear call to action by juxtaposing current behavior with the inevitability of time running out.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The statement would be useful if the audience is open to reflecting on their behavior, values personal growth, and acknowledges the finite nature of life.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement could be misleading if the audience is not currently abusing or contemning themselves, or if it assumes that imminent change is applicable to all situations, ignoring individual circumstances where self-critique may not be warranted."
}
```

parsed_json.communicative_function: The statement is a reflective exhortation urging an individual to cease self-neglect and recognize the finite nature of life.
implicit_claims: Self-respect and self-care are important but often neglected.
There is limited time available to change one's behavior.
Current behaviors are characterized by self-abuse and self-contempt.
There will come a point when it will be too late to change one's behavior.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: The statement is internally coherent, creating a clear call to action by juxtaposing current behavior with the inevitability of time running out.
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: The statement would be useful if the audience is open to reflecting on their behavior, values personal growth, and acknowledges the finite nature of life.
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: The statement could be misleading if the audience is not currently abusing or contemning themselves, or if it assumes that imminent change is applicable to all situations, ignoring individual circumstances where self-critique may not be warranted.
